_instructions: 1. Copy this file to settings.json (same folder).
2. Fill in your details. settings.json is gitignored — stays on pen drive only.
3. forms_folder: create C:\Forms on the target Windows PC.
Inside it, one subfolder per form, each with one blank PDF.
4. output_folder: where filled PDFs will be saved after each run.
5. Y coordinates in forms.json are from the BOTTOM of the page.
A4 bottom = y:0, A4 top = y:842. Use CoordPicker.exe to find them.
